reviews.comment:
Mala predisposición de los playeros para la carga de combustible, dejan cargando, se van se corta la bomba viene otro te cierra la venta con el tanque por la mitad, nadie se ocupa realmente, si tenes ganas de pasar un mal rato vayan a cargar nafta ahí.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are unwilling to fill up with fuel. They leave the tank still empty, then drive off, the pump cuts out, and someone else comes and closes the deal with you halfway down the tank. No one really cares. If you're feeling pesky, go fill up there.
